emails.theme: Abandoned Checkout 1 of 3: You're One Step From Done
emails.shortDescription: Abandoned Checkout flow email 1. Same layout as the Abandoned Cart flow, fresh checkout copy. Headline You're one step from done, founder voice hook, dynamic checkout product block, three risk free badges (Made in USA, Free US shipping $150+, Ironclad 90 day guarantee), family owned line, Need a Hand support section (kept from cart), final CTA Complete Your Order. No offer in email 1.
emails.notes: Abandoned Checkout flow (not a dated send). Client brief Jul 9 + 3 Abandoned Cart reference screenshots. Rev: headline changed (no body echo), subject lines rewritten (not = heading), final CTA Complete Your Order. APPROVED by client Jul 9. Support 877-695-6469 ext 2.
emails.creativeDirection: LogOX dark blue #24374A / orange #F37021 CTA / royal blue hero #2E6FB5, PT Sans. Match Abandoned Cart Email 1 layout. Dynamic checkout block, 3 risk free badges, Need a Hand section, shared forest + trust badge footer.

emails.theme: Abandoned Checkout 2 of 3: Let's Knock $10 Off (Offer First)
emails.shortDescription: Abandoned Checkout flow email 2, offer-first layout (approved v2). Hero, $10 off block up top with code LOG10-XXX and the three tiers ($150 free shipping, $250 2x gifts, $500 trucker hat), dynamic checkout item + Complete Your Order CTA, stock reinforcement lower (best sellers move fast, restocks take weeks, yours in stock now), As Featured In (Firewood for Life, Fairfield University EMG data), 90 day guarantee with Austin Roberts founder quote.
emails.notes: Abandoned Checkout flow (not a dated send). Client approved Variant B (v2, offer-first) Jul 9 and asked to remove v1; v1 removed, file now v2 only. Same offers as cart flow. Support info@thelogox.com / 877-695-6469 ext 1. EMG stats and founder quote verbatim from client reference. APPROVED Jul 9.
emails.offerCode: LOG10-XXX: $10 off orders $150+. Tiers: $150 free US shipping (LogOX brand), $250 2x LogOX gifts, $500 Team LogOX trucker hat.
emails.creativeDirection: LogOX dark blue/orange/royal blue hero, PT Sans. Match Abandoned Cart Email 2. Hero + 3 lifestyle photos, stock copy, dynamic checkout block, $10 off + 3 tier tiles, As Featured In (Firewood for Life + Fairfield), founder guarantee, shared footer.

emails.theme: Abandoned Checkout 3 of 3: Last Call Before Release (Urgency)
emails.shortDescription: Abandoned Checkout flow email 3. Same layout as Abandoned Cart Email 3. Maximum urgency: hero recaps all three tiers ($150 free shipping, $250 two free gifts, $500 free trucker hat), stackable $10 off with LOG10-XXX, dynamic checkout block + Complete Your Order CTA, Why LogOX Is Built Differently comparison table (LogOX vs Others), lifestyle band, three real five star reviews (Joshua W, John & Ramona, Roland G), scarcity close (order released to inventory soon).
emails.notes: Abandoned Checkout flow (not a dated send). Reviews verbatim from client reference (real, not invented). Comparison table and tiers match cart Email 3. CTA Complete Your Order. Copy-ready Jul 9.
emails.offerCode: LOG10-XXX stackable $10 off $150+. Tiers: $150 free shipping, $250 two free gifts, $500 free Team LogOX trucker hat.
emails.creativeDirection: LogOX dark blue/orange/royal blue hero, PT Sans. Match Abandoned Cart Email 3. Tier recap hero, $10 stack line, dynamic checkout block, LogOX vs Others table, lifestyle band, 3 review cards with product thumbnails, scarcity close, shared footer.
